login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your personal account
login.doctor_desc: Manage your schedule, conduct consultations, and help patients online
login.platform_desc: Modern telemedicine platform for online consultations with doctors

register.title: Sign Up
register.patient_desc: Book appointments, online consultations, store medical documents
register.doctor_desc: Conduct online appointments, manage schedule, work with patients
register.doctor_form_desc: Fill in your details to create a doctor profile
register.patient_form_desc: Create an account to book appointments
register.iin_hint: 12 digits as shown in your ID document
register.consent_personal_data: I consent to the collection and processing of personal data according to the
register.consent_medical_data: I consent to the processing of medical data, including health information, consultations, diagnoses, prescriptions, and medical documents.
register.consent_telemedicine: I give informed consent to receive remote medical care through the platform.
register.consent_third_party: I consent to transferring necessary data to doctors, the payment partner, and other third parties listed in the privacy policy.
register.doctor_join_desc: Help patients online and grow your practice
register.patient_join_desc: Registration gives you access to the best doctors in Kazakhstan
register.patient_benefits_2: All appointment history in one place

validation.password: Password: at least 8 characters, with uppercase, lowercase, a digit and a special character
validation.consents: You must accept all required consents
validation.phone_taken: This phone number is already registered
validation.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters long
validation.password_whitespace_edges: Password must not start or end with a space
validation.password_needs_uppercase: Add at least one uppercase letter
validation.password_needs_lowercase: Add at least one lowercase letter
validation.password_needs_special: Add at least one special character (e.g. ! @ # $ %)

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password?
forgot_password.desc: Enter your email and we will send you a password reset link
forgot_password.sent_desc: We sent a password reset link to {{email}}
forgot_password.spam_note: If the email didn't arrive, check your Spam folder

reset_password.title: New Password
reset_password.desc: Enter a new password for your account
reset_password.success_desc: Your password has been successfully changed. You can now sign in.

hero.description: Get qualified medical care without leaving home. Our specialists are ready to help you right now.

hero_card.title: Online Consultation
hero_card.subtitle: Choose a convenient time
hero_card.item_0_desc: Only certified specialists with verified experience
hero_card.item_1_desc: Consultations from anywhere in the world without queues
hero_card.item_2_desc: Support team is always available to resolve your questions

features.title: Why Choose MedConnect
features.subtitle: Modern technology for your health and comfort
features.card_0_desc: HD quality without delays. Secure P2P connection for comfortable communication.
features.card_1_desc: Data encryption and compliance with medical security standards.
features.card_2_desc: Book a convenient time or get an urgent consultation at any moment.
features.card_3_desc: Prescriptions, conclusions and referrals in electronic form right after consultation.

specializations.title: Choose the Right Specialist
specializations.subtitle: A wide range of medical directions

steps.title: Just 4 Simple Steps
steps.subtitle: To your doctor consultation
steps.step_0_desc: Find a specialist by direction, rating, or reviews
steps.step_1_desc: Choose a convenient date and time for consultation
steps.step_2_desc: Secure payment via Kaspi, Halyk or by card
steps.step_3_desc: Join the video call at the scheduled time

testimonials.title: What Our Patients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Over 1,000 satisfied patients
testimonials.review_0: Excellent service! Got a therapist consultation in 15 minutes without leaving home.
testimonials.review_1: Very convenient for busy people. The doctor was attentive and professional.
testimonials.review_2: Booked my child with a pediatrician online. Fast, convenient, recommend it!

about.title: MedConnect — Your Trusted Health Care Partner
about.description: We created a modern telemedicine platform that makes quality medical care accessible to everyone.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We are always available and ready to answer your questions
contact.quick_desc: Book an online consultation with a doctor right now. Our specialists will help you as soon as possible.

cta.title: Start taking care of your health today
cta.description: Registration takes just 2 minutes. Get access to the best doctors in Kazakhstan.

footer.description: Modern telemedicine platform for online consultations with qualified doctors.
footer.address: Republic of Kazakhstan, Astana, Abylai Khan Ave., 42

patient.health_overview: Here's what's happening with your health
patient.health_tip_text: Regular preventive check-ups help detect diseases at early stages

booking.title: Book Appointment
booking.comment_placeholder: Describe the reason for your visit...
booking.slot_taken_other: Sorry, this time slot is already booked. Please choose another.
booking.slot_taken_live: This slot was just selected by another patient. Please choose another.
booking.slot_taken_default: This time is already selected by another patient
booking.slot_taken_booked: Sorry, this slot was just booked by another patient. Please choose another.
booking.slot_taken_long: Sorry, the selected time was booked by another patient. Please choose another available slot.
booking.slot_unavailable: This time is no longer available. Please choose another.
booking.err_generic: An error occurred. Please try again later.
booking.err_init_fallback: Payment initialization error. Please try another method.
booking.err_qr_fallback: QR code generation error. Please try another method.
booking.halyk_appointment_error_title: Payment received, appointment is being checked
booking.halyk_appointment_error_desc: The payment was charged, but the appointment was not created automatically. Check your account or contact support with the receipt.
booking.halyk_refunded_desc: While you were paying, another patient booked this time. Your payment has been refunded automatically — the money will return to your account within a few days. Please choose another time.
booking.halyk_rejected_desc: Please try again or choose another method.
booking.halyk_expired_desc: The QR code (20 min) has expired. Please get a new one.
booking.halyk_open_note: After payment in the app, return here — the appointment will be created automatically.
booking.halyk_scan_desc: Open Halyk Home Bank → Payments → Scan QR
booking.kaspi_amount: Transfer {{price}} via Kaspi.kz to the clinic account.
booking.kaspi_note: After payment, the appointment will be confirmed by the administrator within 30 minutes.
booking.email_note: 📧 Confirmation has been sent to your email
booking.link_note: 🔗 The video consultation link will appear in your account
booking.no_slots_date: No available slots for this date
booking.slot_held_title: Someone is selecting this slot (~{{mins}} min)
booking.slots_held_notice: Locked slots are temporarily reserved by another user
booking.chat_desc: Messaging with the doctor throughout the day
booking.epay_security: 🔒 Payment is secured by encryption (3-D Secure). Refunds are available up to 24 hours before the appointment.

errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters long

video.file_upload_error: Error uploading file "{{name}}". Please try again.
video.deny_too_early_detail_time: Connection opens 15 minutes before start — at {{windowStart}}. Consultation starts: {{dateTime}} (Astana time).
video.deny_too_early_detail: Connection will open closer to the consultation time.
video.deny_too_late_detail: The connection window is closed. Contact support if you think this is an error.
video.deny_wrong_status_detail: The consultation is already completed or unavailable.
video.deny_not_participant_detail: You are not a participant of this consultation.
video.deny_not_found_detail: Check the link and try again.
video.deny_error_detail: Try again in a few seconds.
video.waiting_patient: The patient will join the consultation shortly
video.waiting_doctor: The doctor will join you shortly
video.complete_confirm_desc: The appointment status will be changed to "Completed". This action cannot be undone.
video.rate_desc: Your feedback will help improve service quality
video.media_error: Could not access camera and microphone
video.media_error_unsupported: This browser does not support camera and microphone access in this mode.
video.media_error_insecure: Camera and microphone access works only over HTTPS or localhost.
video.media_error_denied: The browser or operating system denied camera and microphone access.
video.media_error_not_found: Camera or microphone was not found. Check the connected devices.
video.media_error_busy: Camera or microphone is busy in another app. Close it and try again.
video.media_error_constraints: The camera does not support the requested settings. Try again.
video.media_error_abort: The browser interrupted the camera or microphone request. Try again.
video.media_error_detail: Could not access camera and microphone ({{errorName}}).
